title: Andy Rachleff endorses Incorruptible
summary: Wealthfront and Benchmark Capital cofounder Andy Rachleff calls Incorruptible the most practical guide to keeping a company mission-driven as it scales, at a time when Silicon Valley feels increasingly mercenary.
blockquote: After decades as a venture capitalist and then founding Wealthfront, I've learned it's incredibly hard to keep a company truly mission-driven as it scales. Incorruptible is the most practical guide I've seen to doing exactly that. It shows how special leaders built breakthrough business models, cultures, incentives, and governance to insure their mission endured. At a time when Silicon Valley feels increasingly mercenary, this book is a refreshing reminder that idealism and performance are not trade-offs. If you're a founder, investor, or engineer who wants to change the world or build a great enterprise then this book is well worth your time.
attribution_title: Cofounder of Wealthfront and Benchmark Capital; Lecturer at Stanford GSB
